violations.text: The cooking area is lacking a hand-washing sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The slicer blade located in the deli area was not in good repair (corrosion was observed). PIC instructed not to use slicer in current blade condition. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelf/counter in the deli area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Foil is used in the construction of shelf liner in the deli display case. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
3 bay sink located in the deli area was not in good repair (crack with water leaking). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - walk-in cooler retail shelves, - deli display cooler, - walk-in fan covers (both walk-ins) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The following was observed in poor repair. - walk-in cooler floors (broken tiles) - retail floor tiles (broken tiles) - retail ceiling tiles (previous water damage) - kitchen ceiling tile (missing tile) - walk-in cooler retail glass door (cracked door) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025
The ceiling in the deli area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergy statement. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The cooking area is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The hand-washing sink in the deli area and bathroom was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Deli meat and cheese were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC added dates. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Establishment was observed selling Oreo cookie sleaves outside of original package. PIC to sell items in original container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Walk-in located near cashier area was not in good repair (ambient 55F was observed). No TCS foods to be stored in this cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelf/counter in the deli AND kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Foil is used in the construction of shelf liners in the deli display cooler. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
3 bay sink located in the deli area was not in good repair (crack with water leaking). New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - walk-in cooler retail shelves - deli display cooler - walk-in cooler fan covers New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The following was observed in poor repair. - walk-in cooler floors (broken tiles) - retail floor tiles (broken tiles) - retail ceiling tiles (previous water damage) - kitchen ceiling tile (missing tile) - walk-in cooler retail glass door (cracked door)The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The ceiling in the deli area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025
